steps.title: Translate distance for each activity
steps.content: Distance = speed $\times$ time. Walking: 2 mph for $w$ hours gives $2w$ miles. Running: 7 mph for $r$ hours gives $7r$ miles.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A: $2w + 7r = 13$ — matches the derived equation. ✓
  • B: $\frac{1}{2}w + \frac{1}{7}r = 13$ — uses reciprocals of speed (time per mile), not speed. ✗
  • C: $\frac{1}{2}w + \frac{1}{7}r = 117$ — wrong coefficients and wrong total. ✗
  • D: $2w + 7r = 117$ — correct coefficients but the total is 13 miles, not 117. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
